negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Acceptance is limited per the page: 'limited number of visiting international applicants worldwide.' Domestic applicants follow a SEPARATE lane at medstudentaffairs.pitt.edu/visiting-students/domestic-visiting-students which was not fetched in detail this turn.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: UPMC Presbyterian specifically is not named on the international hub; placement is by UPMC department after Global Health Dean review.

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — Pitt SOM Research+International Studies hub; (b) international final-year-MS-with-core-clinical-completed only; (c) up to 2 clinical electives, $4,500 per elective + $800-$1,500 housing; (d) Global Health Dean pre-review then UPMC department review; (e) 3-month lead time; (f) cancellation 25%/50%. Domestic VSLO lane is separate at medstudentaffairs.pitt.edu — needs its own packet retry.
plainEnglishSummary: UPMC's Pitt SOM accepts international visiting medical students in their final year (with core clinical training completed) for up to two 4-week electives. Tuition is $4,500 per elective, plus $800-$1,500 for housing. Application can be VSLO or paper (paper preferred), reviewed first by the Global Health Dean and then by the UPMC department. Visa support is acknowledged. UPMC Presbyterian specifically isn't named; placement is allocated by department. Domestic VSLO students follow a separate lane.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because Pennsylvania gained its first P101 packet with an explicit international-eligible lane and verbatim cost evidence.

userFacingSummaryDraft.oneSentenceSummary: Pitt SOM accepts international final-year MS who have completed core clinical training for up to two 4-week electives at UPMC; $4,500 tuition + $800-$1,500 housing per elective.
userFacingSummaryDraft.whoThisIsFor: International final-year medical students who have completed their core clinical training.
userFacingSummaryDraft.whoThisIsNotFor: MD graduates / IMG observers; pre-clinical students; US LCME/COCA students (separate domestic lane exists).
userFacingSummaryDraft.howToApply: VSLO or paper (paper preferred); Global Health Dean pre-review; 3-month lead time required; max 2 clinical electives.
userFacingSummaryDraft.estimatedCostSummary: $4,500 per 4-week clinical elective. Housing $800-$1,500 range. 25%/50% cancellation tiers.
keyCaveats: International final-year MS only — must have completed core clinical training
Acceptance letter issued for visa purposes; visa type not specified on hub
Max two 4-week electives per applicant (8 weeks total)
userFacingSummaryDraft.whyWeClassifiedItThisWay: INTERNATIONAL_STUDENT_CONFIRMED because the hub explicitly states 'ONLY for international students who have completed their core clinical training and are in their final year'.
userFacingSummaryDraft.possibleListingTitle: UPMC Presbyterian — International Visiting Student Program (Pittsburgh, PA)
userFacingSummaryDraft.possibleMetaDescription: Pitt SOM IVSP: international final-year MS only with core clinical complete; $4,500/elective + $800-$1,500 housing; max 8 weeks at UPMC.
